summary: Messaging Feature Testing Complete - All 17 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Therapist-controlled messaging visibility, restriction to assigned clients, and read-only mode enforcement verified. Fixed a bug where contacts list wasn't refreshing after toggling client messaging settings.

design_issues.screen: New Message Dialog / Client Settings Dialog
issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

seed_data_creation: Test messages created during testing with TEST_ prefix. Test clients: Test Client Alpha (c283749c-2c50-48d7-94bf-e4588247883d), Messaging Test Client (c97b31a8-a2c6-427c-8653-bc7e3f983e08)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messaging feature fully tested. All P0 requirements verified. Fixed bug in Messaging.js where contacts list wasn't refreshing after toggling client messaging settings.

therapist_sees_assigned_clients_in_conta.description: Therapist can see assigned clients in messaging contacts
therapist_sees_assigned_clients_in_conta.frontend_verified: Conversations list shows assigned clients, New Message dialog shows client dropdown

therapist_can_send_message.description: Therapist can send message to assigned client
therapist_can_send_message.frontend_verified: Message input, send button, messages display correctly

therapist_can_disable_client_messaging.description: Therapist can disable messaging for a client via Client Settings
therapist_can_disable_client_messaging.frontend_verified: Client Settings dialog with toggle switches for each client

disabled_client_not_in_contacts.description: Disabled client doesn't appear in messaging contacts
disabled_client_not_in_contacts.frontend_verified: After disabling, client removed from New Message dropdown (fixed bug)

expired_subscription_read_only.description: Therapist with expired subscription cannot send messages (read-only mode)
expired_subscription_read_only.frontend_verified: Read-only warning banner shown, message input disabled for expired subscriptions

messages_ui_display.description: Messages UI shows conversations and individual messages correctly
messages_ui_display.frontend_verified: Conversations list, messages panel, message bubbles with timestamps

new_message_dialog.description: New Message dialog works to start conversations
new_message_dialog.frontend_verified: Dialog opens, contact select dropdown, Start Conversation button

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/messaging-contacts - Get contacts for messaging (filters disabled clients)
POST /api/messages - Send message to assigned client
GET /api/messages/{user_id} - Get messages with specific user

bug_fixed.issue: Contacts list not refreshing after toggling client messaging settings
bug_fixed.fix: Added contacts refresh call after successful toggle API call in handleToggleClientMessaging function
